findings.detail: Unused imports: field from dataclasses, Any from typing. Not a security issue but dead code.
findings.mitigation: Remove unused imports in next cleanup pass.

findings.detail: verify_claim_historical_v2() catches broad Exception and returns neutral 0.50. This is by design for the Layer 4 drop-in replacement — failure must never crash the pipeline. The broad catch is appropriate for a fallback function.
findings.mitigation: No action needed — intentional graceful degradation.

notes: Pure computation — zero LLM calls. No file I/O, no network. All data from config/regime_library (immutable list). Euclidean distance computation is deterministic. Weighted distance respects quadrant context. No data leakage.
